Package org.areslib.subsystems.vision

Class AresVisionSubsystem

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.command.SubsystemBase
org.areslib.subsystems.vision.AresVisionSubsystem
All Implemented Interfaces:
Subsystem
public class AresVisionSubsystem extends SubsystemBase
Core vision subsystem that wraps a VisionIO interface to provide validated AprilTag-derived pose estimates and configurable confidence scoring.

This subsystem performs three levels of sanity checking on incoming vision data:

  1. Z-elevation ghost rejection (robot floating/underground)
  2. Field boundary validation (robot outside legal play area)
  3. Target area gating (target too small to be reliable)
See Also:
  • VisionIO
  • AresSensorFusionSubsystem

  • Constructor Details

    • AresVisionSubsystem

      public AresVisionSubsystem(VisionIO io, double minTargetAreaPercent, double maxTrustAreaPercent)
      Constructs a core vision subsystem, parameterized for specific game or camera heuristics.
      Parameters:
      io - The hardware IO interface (e.g., LimelightVisionWrapper).
      minTargetAreaPercent - Absolute minimum target size (% of image) to be considered valid.
      maxTrustAreaPercent - Target size (% of image) corresponding to 100% confidence.

  • Method Details

    • periodic

      public void periodic()
      Description copied from interface: Subsystem
      This method is called periodically by the CommandScheduler. Useful for updating subsystem-specific state that you don't want to defer to a Command.

    • setYawSupplier

      public void setYawSupplier(Supplier<Rotation2d> yawSupplier)
      Configures a provider to continuously feed the exact WPILib/ARESLib Field-Centric robot yaw into the vision system over USB for Megatag2 processing.
      Parameters:
      yawSupplier - A method reference, e.g., () -> swerve.getPose().getRotation()

    • hasTarget

      public boolean hasTarget()

    • getTargetXOffset

      public double getTargetXOffset()
      Gets the horizontal offset from the crosshair.
      Returns:
      Horizontal offset from crosshair to target (Tx) in degrees.

    • getTargetYOffset

      public double getTargetYOffset()
      Gets the vertical offset from the crosshair.
      Returns:
      Vertical offset from crosshair to target (Ty) in degrees.

    • getTargetArea

      public double getTargetArea()
      Gets the target area as a percentage.
      Returns:
      Target Area (Ta) in percent of image.

    • getEstimatedGlobalPose

      public Pose2d getEstimatedGlobalPose()
      Calculates trust coefficient dynamically based on AprilTag latency and visible surface area.

      IMPORTANT: Coordinate Frame Assumption: This subsystem and its consumer AresSensorFusionSubsystem assume the vision system's botPose3d X/Y axes are pre-aligned to the PathPlanner frame (no axis swap). If using a WPILib-standard Limelight with MegaTag2, this is typically true. If using a custom PhotonVision setup where X=forward and Y=left, the axes must be swapped before fusion blending.

      Returns:
      Field-centric 2D pose estimated by the vision system. Null if target isn't trustworthy.

    • getVisionMeasurementStdDevs

      public double[] getVisionMeasurementStdDevs(double currentAngularVelocityRadPerSec)
      Calculates dynamic standard deviations for the vision measurement (X, Y, Theta) based on Elite team heuristics (Team 5940 B.R.E.A.D. and Team 254).
      Parameters:
      currentAngularVelocityRadPerSec - The current rotational velocity of the drivetrain.
      Returns:
      A double array [xStdDev, yStdDev, thetaStdDev] or null if the measurement should be rejected.

    • setPipeline

      public void setPipeline(int index)
